# STEP Fixture Suite

This directory contains curated STEP fixtures for CAD import, duplicate grouping, shape classification, and future feature-recognition tests. Each `.step`/`.stp` file has a sibling `.expected.json` file with provenance, license, purpose, and baseline geometry values generated through the app's OCCT import settings.

## Ground Truth Policy

- Self-authored fixtures were generated with CadQuery from explicit dimensions and then imported through OCCT for baseline values.
- CADCLAW fixtures were generated from the MIT-licensed CADCLAW fixture generator.
- Existing local fixtures came from `public/test_files/`; their provenance is recorded as local/internal because no third-party license metadata exists in this repo.
- User-supplied local fixtures came from the user's machine and are recorded as internal/local fixtures unless explicit third-party license metadata is added later.
- Any future change to an expected value should be paired with a visual/manual review note explaining why the baseline changed.

## Fixtures

| Fixture | Purpose | Categories | Meshes | Groups | Size | Source / License |

| `cadclaw_l1_bad.step` | CADCLAW generated bracket assembly with deliberate clipping/missing-part error for negative-case coverage. | assembly, pathological geometry, interference case | 5 | 3 | 67064 | CADCLAW L1_bad; MIT |
| `cadclaw_l1_good.step` | CADCLAW generated clean bracket assembly with two beams, plates, and connector. | assembly, simple bracket, inventory baseline | 5 | 3 | 67054 | CADCLAW L1_good; MIT |
| `cadclaw_l2_bad.step` | CADCLAW generated motor mount assembly with an extra repeated wheel for inventory/duplicate drift coverage. | assembly, duplicate grouping, pathological geometry | 11 | 6 | 145642 | CADCLAW L2_bad; MIT |
| `cadclaw_l2_good.step` | CADCLAW generated motor mount assembly containing a drilled mount plate and repeated wheels. | bracket with multiple holes, assembly, duplicate grouping | 10 | 6 | 128793 | CADCLAW L2_good; MIT |
| `cadclaw_l3_good.step` | CADCLAW generated larger gantry-corner assembly for multi-body import and grouping coverage. | assembly, rotated duplicates, large fixture | 18 | 9 | 188141 | CADCLAW L3_good; MIT |
| `local_locus_machine_fixture.stp` | Existing local fixture assembly used for CAD handoff acceptance; expected to exercise duplicate grouping. | assembly, duplicate grouping, rotated duplicates | 10 | 6 | 4288313 | LOCUS SYSTEMS MACHINE FIXTURE.stp; internal/local fixture; no third-party license recorded in repo |

## Coverage Checklist

- [x] Simple machined plate
- [x] Counterbored plate
- [x] Hex bar stock
- [x] Round shaft
- [x] Round tube / through-bore stock
- [x] Round shaft with through-hole
- [x] Stepped shoulder shaft
- [x] Bracket with multiple holes
- [x] Assembly with mirrored instances
- [x] Assembly with rotated duplicates
- [x] Near-duplicate variants
- [x] Filleted/chamfered edges
- [x] Deep pocket
- [x] Thin wall
- [x] Pathological / fine tessellation and multi-body assemblies

## Size Limit

All fixtures are below the 10 MB per-file limit.
